testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
03:19:05.780 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [importaciones.ImportacionesApplicationTests]: ImportacionesApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 03:19:05.892 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration importaciones.ImportacionesApplication for test class importaciones.ImportacionesApplicationTests 03:19:05.981 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [importaciones.ImportacionesApplicationTests]: ImportacionesApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 03:19:05.986 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration importaciones.ImportacionesApplication for test class importaciones.ImportacionesApplicationTests
